chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 45 of 2024 (Altaf Hussain versus Province of Sindh and others) Present: Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro, J. Date of hearing: 26.03.2024 Date of decision: 26.03.2024 Mr. J. K. Jarwar, Advocate for petitioner. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – Petitioner, by means of this petition, is seeking directions for respondents No.2 and 3 (DIGP, Sukkur Range and SSP Khairpur) to take action against respondent No.4 (SHO, Police Station Hingorja) and suspend him till final disposal of the case, and to take departmental action against him for giving a misstatement before the Raid Commissioner. Further, respondent No.5 (IO, Crime No.123/2023 of Police Station Hingorja) may be directed to conduct a fair investigation in the case. 2. We have heard learned Counsel for the petitioner, and are not satisfied with maintainability of this petition as there is nothing on record to show that respondent No.5 is conducting dishonest investigation in Crime No.123/2023. He has not satisfied us as either under what law, directions to DIGP, Sukkur Range and SSP Khairpur can be given to suspend SHO, Police Station Hingorja. 3. Therefore, accordingly, this petition being meritless is dismissed in limine along with pending application(s), if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
